where_to_eat.name: Spice Market (Egyptian Bazaar)
where_to_eat.description: The main spice market offering an incredibly vibrant and overwhelming sensory experience with vendors and traditional Turkish products. A classic Istanbul destination mentioned as a must-see tourist attraction.

into_the_wild.name: Bosphorous Strait
into_the_wild.description: The scenic strait separating Europe and Asia, offering stunning waterfront views and a quintessential Istanbul experience. Highly photogenic and perfect for experiencing the city's natural geography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Blue Mosque
gram_worthy_spots.description: An iconic Istanbul landmark with stunning architecture perfect for photography. One of the most photographed sites in the city.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Hagia Sophia
gram_worthy_spots.description: A magnificent historical structure offering breathtaking interior and architectural details that are popular for photography and sightseeing.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Rooftop Restaurants
gram_worthy_spots.description: Elevated dining venues throughout Istanbul offering panoramic views of the city skyline and Bosphorous, perfect for capturing beautiful photos of the cityscape.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Random Rooftop Locations
off_the_beaten_path.description: Exploring lesser-known rooftop areas across the city provides unique perspectives and photographic opportunities away from the main tourist crowds.
